query: SELECT ar.id, ar.status, COUNT(ac.id) as num_comments FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN adjustment_comments ac ON ar.id = ac.adjustmentRequestId GROUP BY ar.id HAVING num_comments > 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT ar.id, ar.status, COUNT(ac.id) as num_comments FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN adjustment_comments ac ON ar.id = ac.adjustmentRequestId GROUP BY ar.id HAVING num_comments > 0;
